catalog_content:
Item Name: Sun-Maid • Blue Raspberry Fruity Raisins Snacks, 0.7 Ounce Box (21 Total), Dried Fruit, 0g Added Sugar, Non-GMO, Ideal Lunch Box Snack
Bullet Point 1: NOT A GUMMY BUT JUST AS YUMMY: Because they are whole fruit, these fruity snacks have no artificial flavors, no synthetic colors, and are the perfect option to satisfy their sweet tooth when the cravings kick in.
Bullet Point 2: WHOLE FRUIT: Dehydrated Non-GMO dried fruit paired with other natural flavors for a delicious healthy snacks for adults and kids. Simple versatile snacks that is perfect for on the go.
Bullet Point 3: PERFECT ON-THE-GO SNACK: In the car snack, before soccer practice snack, dance time break snack, hiking trail snack, pool side snack, the list goes on. Essentially, the perfect snack for any moment, any time.
Bullet Point 4: IDEAL LUNCHBOX SNACK: With candy flavor and NO ADDED SUGAR, it is the lunch time snack that you can treat them with every day
Bullet Point 5: GROWN & Packaged In California, USA. Product Ships As A 7 Count (Pack Of 3)
Product Description: Sun-Maid Fruity Raisin Snacks are a delicious treat for you and your family. The sweetness of Sun-Maid raisins create a tangy, vibrant taste, while the natural flavors deliver a delightful fruity tartness. Whether as a lunch box surprise or a post-workout treat, our Fruity Raisin Snacks are as fun as they are good for you. Sun-Maid Fruity Raisin Snacks are like all those sour candies kids love, except made from real whole fruit! Founded in 1912, Sun-Maid Growers of California is a farmers’ cooperative of 750 grower families with vineyards in California’s Central Valley. From childhood to adulthood and generation to generation, Sun-Maid snacks have grown up with you. And while some things change, our ingredients haven’t—they’re real, minimally processed and consistently good. The timeless and trusted go-to snack that’s simple, healthy and versatile, Sun-Maid fills each day with moments of sunshine, one little red box at a time.
Value: 14.7
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: A family-friendly snack brand offering a budget-friendly, healthy alternative to candy. The product is positioned as a natural, no-added-sugar option with a focus on whole fruit and versatility. The packaging is standard cardboard, and the bundle deal provides value through quantity. Pricing is likely driven by the natural ingredients, brand trust, and convenience for on-the-go consumption.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Delicate Italian Extra Virgin Olive Oil Cold Pressed - Light Olive Oil for Cooking and Frying, Imported from Italy - Masserie di Sant'Eramo - 16.9 Fl Oz (Pack 1)
Bullet Point 1: Award-Winning EVOO - Produced from selected Ogliarola Barese olives and other premium olive varieties from the best groves of Apulia in Italy, this cold pressed olive oil reflects a commitment to quality and safety, ensuring a premium product for culinary use. It has been honored with first place in the Light Fruity EVO Oil category at the 2024 Nutrievo Awards.
Bullet Point 2: Versatile for Cold and Hot Dishes - Our Delicate Extra Virgin Olive Oil is ideal for both cold and hot preparations. With its delicate fruity taste and a hint of almonds, it enhances a variety of dishes, including delicate items like fish, cakes, and hors d’oeuvres.
Bullet Point 3: Perfect for Fish - With its subtle almond notes and light, fruity flavor, this imported olive oil is specifically recommended as a condiment for fish, adding a refined touch without overpowering the dish. It boasts an acidity level of less than 0.5%.
Bullet Point 4: Traceability and Quality Assurance - Certified with the ISO 22005 standard for traceability in the agri-food chain, the origin and history of this Italian olive oil are meticulously recorded, guaranteeing top-notch quality from field to table. Additionally, this "Delicate" olive oil is bottled in dark green glass to protect it from light and safeguard its excellent nutritional properties.
Bullet Point 5: Enhances Delicate Dishes - The light fruity profile of this high quality olive oil makes it perfect for raw consumption, complementing delicate dishes such as fish, white sauce pastas, vegetables, boiled vegetables, and white meats, as well as being an excellent choice for preparing desserts.
Bullet Point 6: Family Heritage and Excellence - Established in the early 1990s by the Natuzzi family, Masserie di Sant’Eramo is a Southern Italy-based company with a three-generation history. It focuses on enhancing local products and promoting 'Made in Italy', emphasizing quality, culture, and the health benefits of real extra virgin olive oil.
Bullet Point 7: Cold-Pressed for Superior Quality – This extra virgin olive oil is obtained using the first cold pressing method, where olives are pressed only once, without heat or chemicals, shortly after picking. This traditional process preserves the natural aroma, flavor, and nutritional properties of the oil.
Bullet Point 8: Low Acidity for a Smooth Taste – With an acidity level of less than 0.5%, this premium Italian EVOO offers a mild, well-balanced taste. The low acidity ensures freshness, making it an excellent choice for those who appreciate a lighter, more delicate olive oil.
Bullet Point 9: Imported from Italy – 100% Authentic – Directly sourced from the renowned olive groves of Apulia, Italy, this authentic extra virgin olive oil upholds the rich tradition of Italian olive cultivation and production, ensuring a genuine taste of the Mediterranean.
Bullet Point 10: Ideal for Everyday Cooking – Whether drizzled over salads, used for sautéing, or incorporated into homemade dressings and marinades, this delicate olive oil enhances flavors without overpowering, making it a staple for any kitchen.
Product Description: Masserie di Sant'Eramo Delicate Extra Virgin Olive Oil is crafted from selected Ogliarola Barese olives and other premium olive varieties from the best groves in the Murge area of Apulia. Using first cold pressing, the olives are pressed only once, shortly after picking, without heat to increase yields. This method preserves the bouquet and flavor of the olives. The ""Ogliarola Barese"" olives contribute outstanding smoothness, while other varieties add fruitiness and complexity to the blend. The oil is bottled in dark green glass to protect it from light and maintain its excellent nutritional properties, and it has an acidity level of less than 0.5%. Award-winning for its quality, this cold-pressed olive oil has earned first place in the Light Fruity EVO Oil category at the 2024 Nutrievo Awards. Versatile for both cold and hot preparations, it features a delicate fruity taste with a hint of almonds, making it ideal for a variety of dishes, including delicate items like fish, cakes, and hors d’oeuvres. Particularly recommended as a condiment for fish, it adds a refined touch without overpowering the dish. Certified with the ISO 22005 standard for traceability, its origin and history are meticulously recorded to ensure top-notch quality from field to table. Established in the early 1990s by the Natuzzi family, Masserie di Sant’Eramo is a Southern Italy-based company with a rich three-generation history. The company focuses on enhancing local products and promoting 'Made in Italy,' with a strong emphasis on quality, culture, and the health benefits of authentic extra virgin olive oil.
Value: 16.9
Unit: Fl Oz
product_name: Delicate Italian Extra Virgin Olive Oil
overall_summary: Premium Italian extra virgin olive oil with award-winning quality, cold-pressed for superior taste and nutrition. Dark glass bottle and low acidity (less than 0.5%) indicate high-end positioning. Versatile for cooking and drizzling, ideal for delicate dishes like fish and desserts. Family heritage brand with strong 'Made in Italy' appeal and traceability certification.
